description: Agent loads a skill via tool_search, uses it, then completes with final tool

input.content: Help me set up a Slack integration for my workspace

calls.output_content: I'll search for the relevant skill to help you with Slack integration.

input.content: Help me set up a Slack integration
I'll search for the relevant skill
Found skill: slack_setup (Slack workspace integration guide)

calls.output_content: I found the Slack setup skill. Let me load it to guide you through the process.

input.content: Help me set up a Slack integration

calls.output_content:
I've loaded the Slack setup guide. Here's how to set up your Slack integration:

1. Go to api.slack.com/apps and create a new app
2. Add the necessary OAuth scopes
3. Install the app to your workspace
4. Copy the Bot User OAuth Token
5. Add it as a connection in Distri

Would you like me to help you with any of these steps?
